name: Bite Nite
short_description: A vampire game of biting, killing, crafting, hiding, running and searching! Four different game modes. Play online or single player!
detailed_description:
JOIN THE DISCORD


About the Game


Storm Dracula's castle to rescue your friend, steal the treasure, and destroy Dracula's coffin! Or chase, bite, and kill the villagers as the newest member of Dracula's family...Choose from four different game modes to play online with friends or play single player with AI bots.


Villagers open chests by doing puzzles or using keys hidden around the map. Gather the most treasure and escape the castle before time runs out to be the winner! Beware of Dracula and anyone he converts to his side!


Villagers try to find keys and the prisoner to free them of their chains before time runs out! Dracula tries to kill everyone!


Villagers light torches around the castle to unlock Dracula's lair and then destroy his coffin before time runs out! Dracula tries to bite and kill everyone!


Villagers hide and vampires try to find and bite them!


  • Forge Neck Guards to knock out vampires that try to bite you!
  • Craft Wooden Stakes to kill vampires!
  • Bake Garlic Bread to stun vampires!
  • Use potions to get special abilities!
  • As a ghost help the villagers by protecting and guiding them!


  • Bite villagers to turn them into vampires!
  • Kill villagers to turn them into ghosts!
  • See in the dark!
  • Beware of Wooden Stakes, Garlic Bread, and Neck Guards!


  • Customize your character in a variety of outfits, hairstyles, skin and hair colors!
  • Four game modes - Treasure mode, Rescue mode, Torch mode, and Hide and Seek!
  • Lots of game settings for the host to adjust!
  • Play multiplayer online or single player against AI bots!
  • Cross platform play between PC, Android, and iOS!
